cc.meta.title: Contract Caller — Interact with any contract without coding
cc.meta.description: Pick a network, paste a contract address and ABI, and call read/write methods with human-friendly inputs. Supports proxy contracts, batch calls, and atomic chained calls.
cc.title: Contract Caller
cc.subtitle: Interact with any smart contract — no code required.
cc.guide.step1Desc: Search any EVM chain by name or chain ID.
cc.guide.step2Desc: Paste an address — we'll fetch its ABI, or paste your own.
cc.guide.step3Desc: Read for free; sign in to send transactions.
cc.config.networkSubtitle: Search any EVM chain by name or chain ID. Reads work everywhere; in-app writes require a chain the built-in wallet supports.
cc.config.autoFetchHint: verified source or bytecode · via WhatsABI
cc.config.autoFetchNeedAddress: Enter a contract address to load its ABI automatically.
cc.config.abiHint: (JSON array, Foundry/Hardhat artifact, or human-readable lines)
cc.config.implementationAbiHint: paste to call the real logic methods
cc.config.implAbiPlaceholder: Paste the implementation contract's ABI (from its verified source on the explorer)
cc.config.proxyUnresolved: Could not resolve the implementation address automatically. You can still call the proxy's own ABI.
cc.methods.addChainTitle: Use this call's result in a chain
cc.batch.title: Batch
cc.batch.hint: One atomic Safe transaction via MultiSend
cc.batch.readOnlyHint: This network is read-only in-app — export the Safe file and run it from your Safe.
cc.chain.title: Chain
cc.chain.hint: Run these calls in one transaction. A step can reuse an earlier step's result.
cc.chain.helperSetupPre: One-time setup: deploy a tiny helper on this chain (same address everywhere —
cc.chain.needsBiubiuWallet: Chaining needs the built-in biubiu wallet.
cc.err.invalidAddress: Enter a valid contract address first.
cc.err.readOnlyMethod: This network is read-only in-app. Use the encoded calldata to execute elsewhere.
cc.err.readOnlyBatch: This network is read-only in-app. Export the Safe batch and run it from your Safe.
cc.err.chainUnsupported: Chaining requires a chain the in-app wallet supports.
cc.err.chainNeedsBiubiu: Atomic chaining requires the built-in biubiu wallet.
cc.err.noAbiFound: No ABI found at this address.
cc.err.noCallableMethods: Found a contract but no callable methods.
cc.err.chainIdMismatch: Chain ID mismatch: RPC is chain {actual}, expected {expected}.
cc.demos.title: Chained-call demos
cc.demos.subtitle: Deploy self-contained showcase contracts in one click, then watch an earlier call's result flow straight into the next — one signature, atomic.
cc.demos.deployedEverywhere: One-time deploy · shared by everyone on this network
cc.demos.loaded: Loaded into the Chain panel → hit Execute, then Verify
cc.demos.needsBiubiu: Demos need the built-in biubiu wallet on a supported chain.
cc.demos.factory.title: Factory builds a contract → Registry records its address
cc.demos.factory.desc: Create a brand-new contract and register its until-now-unknown address — in one atomic transaction.
cc.demos.faucet.title: Random mint → exact transfer
cc.demos.faucet.desc: The faucet mints a random amount to you; the chain forwards that exact amount straight into the transfer.
cc.demos.oracle.title: Oracle quote → settle at that price
cc.demos.oracle.desc: The oracle's quote drifts every block; the chain settles at exactly the price read in the same instant.
cc.demos.lottery.title: Lottery: draw → hit it in the same tx
cc.demos.lottery.desc: The drawer reveals a secret number; the chain reads it and claims with that exact number in the same tx — a guaranteed hit.
